commit_scope: Keep the Mac Coherence Sense witness dashboard always running through a macOS LaunchAgent and add an Android APK self-update lane backed by the public Hati asset summary.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in dirty continuation mode; wellness had no required repair. Python compile and shell syntax checks passed. Initial LaunchAgent install loaded but could not serve discovery because stale foreground PID 19323 (/opt/homebrew/.../Python mac-witness-server.py) already owned port 8800 and served an older dashboard. After verifying the command line, PID 19323 was stopped and the LaunchAgent restarted successfully. Final launchd status: label earth.hati.coherence-sense.mac-witness loaded, state running, pid 49871, dashboard http://localhost:8800, discovery service_type _hati-witness._tcp, mode recognition, port 8800, url http://192.168.0.7:8800. Android Gradle debug build passed with only the existing NSD deprecation warnings. Public Hati asset summary is reachable; current public summary stamp is 20260613T084039Z and lacks download_url, so the app fallback URL remains required until the next publish. Local handshake proof passed with APK sha256 c4a8ea1f8787c4f3392b3923a825407a6d7708e7ce5a7e66c8c1e3c8a6a82be3, local Mac witness frames=1, present=true, organs=accel/gyro/light/mag, local Hati mesh organs_count=2, channels_count=1, android announce receipt rt_c6e644b98175, android heartbeat receipt rt_5fc5f1ab7f17. Generated asset summary includes APK version_code=2, version_name=0.2, download_url=https://hati.earth/downloads/hati-os/android/arm64/coherence-sense-hati-mesh-debug.apk, update_protocol=apk-download-user-consent-installer.

deploy_validation.summary: Local service was installed and verified on this Mac. Updated APK and asset-summary metadata were built locally but not published to GitHub release or hati.earth in this turn.

phase_gate.gate: The Mac witness is kept alive by launchd with a dashboard and mDNS discovery, and Android can discover, verify, download, and hand an updated APK to the system installer through a visible consent flow.
phase_gate.next: Publish the rebuilt APK and asset summary, then install the APK on a real Android device and verify the update button sees the next release and opens Android's installer after hash verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Mac witness no longer depends on an open terminal; it starts at login, restarts after crashes, serves http://localhost:8800, and advertises _hati-witness._tcp. The Android app now checks the public Hati asset summary, displays update state, downloads the published APK, verifies SHA-256, and opens Android's installer with user consent.
test_flows: Install and restart the macOS LaunchAgent, then verify launchd running state and the local witness discovery descriptor.
Build the Android debug APK with update check, FileProvider, and REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES support.
Probe the public Hati asset summary so the updater's current source endpoint is known reachable.

Run the local Android sense public handshake harness to prove APK build, generated public asset summary with update metadata, Mac witness /sense and discovery, local mesh announce/heartbeat/list, and channel offer.
e2e_validation.summary: Local macOS always-on service and Android updater build/proof passed. Device-side installer flow still needs real-device verification because adb/device access was not available here.
